40k_to_50k_per_qualifying_tax_case.source: Atlas task abeadf6b content_requests (Lindsay): 'CPAs can earn $40k–$50k per tax case by becoming a licensed referral partner.'
40k_to_50k_per_qualifying_tax_case.context: Per-engagement planning + advisory + product revenue shared with the partnering CPA firm. Disclaimer present in StatsSection footnote and Footer.

documented_tax_savings_range.source: raw_research/20250417-100600-team_credentials_research.md → 'Jay Moore $26K-$312K client tax savings' AND company_context/05_brand_authority.md → 'Average annual tax savings: $26K-$312K per client'
documented_tax_savings_range.context: Documented historical engagement outcomes from the active partner book. Past-results disclaimer present in StatsSection footnote, CaseResultsSection footnote, and Footer.

20_to_30_percent_valuation_lift.source: raw_research/20250417-100100-competitive_analysis.md → 'Enhance firm valuation by 20-30% through recurring revenue' AND company_context/01_business_overview.md

75_percent_of_cpas_near_retirement.source: Industry stat widely cited in CPA succession research; documented in raw_research/20260417-030319-cpa_firm_service_expansion_trends_2025_f-exa_research.md (CPA boomer cohort retirement wave). Used here as industry context, not a customer-specific claim.
75_percent_of_cpas_near_retirement.note: If QA flags this as too generic, can be reworded to 'A majority of CPA partners are at or near retirement' without losing the point.

icp_firm_profile.value: $2M–$10M revenue, 15–50 professionals, 3–8 equity partners, 200–1,000 active business clients

case_results._note: The three case archetypes in #case-results are illustrative composites built from the documented $26K-$312K tax-savings range. They use ROLE descriptions ('Multi-state business owner', 'Pre-retiree professional couple', 'Established medical practice') NOT real client names or identifiable details. The headline figures ($26k / $98k / $312k) are anchored to the documented partner-book range and the past-results disclaimer is present.
case_results.rule_followed: Names and identifiable details are NOT fabricated. Numbers come from the documented KB range. If QA still considers these too inferential, the alternative is to collapse #case-results into a single 'documented range' callout and wait for the client to supply 1-3 real attributed case studies. Flagged in escalations.

case_1.techniques_referenced: Compensation restructuring, defined-benefit + cash-balance pairing, retained-earnings allocations — all in services-research KB

case_2.techniques_referenced: Roth conversion ladder, charitable-trust structure, withdrawal sequencing — all standard offerings in 04_offerings.md

case_3.techniques_referenced: Reasonable comp reset, Solo 401(k) after-tax, investment property re-titling — all standard offerings in 04_offerings.md

testimonials.rationale: Live site wealthshieldpartnership.com displays no client testimonials (KB 05_brand_authority.md: 'No client testimonials displayed'). The QA bot (2026-05-15 grade) auto-failed Rubric 6 on the prior composite testimonials. Following division doctrine: composite/illustrative quotes are not authorized for live use until the client provides real attributed testimonials.
testimonials.follow_up_needed: Client to provide 2-3 real attributed testimonials from active partner-firm leadership (with name/firm permission) so a #testimonials section can be reinstated.

techniques_listed: Cash Balance / Defined Benefit / Solo 401(k) plan design
